---
title: "Caroline Maria Hallett"
---

## Caroline Maria Hallett

**Dates:** (1841–1915)

**Maiden name:** (Pilkington)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1879-91)

### Biography

She was author of sanitary tracts and religious works. She was the daughter of the Rev. Canon Charles Pilkington and the wife of the Rev. John Thomas Hallett, Vicar of Bishop\'s Tachbrook, Warwickshire.

### Letters

- Letter from June 2d 1890

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
